title: Watch: ‘By 2035, India will be the high rise capital of the world’: Otis India president Sebi Joseph
description: Sebi Joseph, President of Otis India, talks about the company’s expansion plans, how the West Asia crisis is impacting the organisation, his leadership mantra, and more. He also talks at length on the order from real estate company Prestige Estates to install two super fast elevators that can travel at 10 metre/second at the under-construction The Prestige at Mahalaxmi, Mumbai which will be India’s tallest commercial building when complete.
